data.name: Monstrous Love
data.detailed_description:
Three short interactive stories about women exploring their sexuality and becoming intimate with ravenous and gentle monsters. Welcome to a world of sensuality, freedom, and love!

THE HOT STUFF

- A unique, hand-drawn art style adapted from the popular comic by the author herself: Ana Pepper!
- Flirt, connect and maximize pleasure as you control the human and monster lovers
- Around one hour of gameplay, with repeatable sex minigames and several achievements to unlock along the way
- Become a specialist in sex, love and monstrosity
- Sex-positive gaming!
data.about_the_game:
Three short interactive stories about women exploring their sexuality and becoming intimate with ravenous and gentle monsters. Welcome to a world of sensuality, freedom, and love!

THE HOT STUFF

- A unique, hand-drawn art style adapted from the popular comic by the author herself: Ana Pepper!
- Flirt, connect and maximize pleasure as you control the human and monster lovers
- Around one hour of gameplay, with repeatable sex minigames and several achievements to unlock along the way
- Become a specialist in sex, love and monstrosity
- Sex-positive gaming!
data.short_description: Monstrous Love contains three adult short stories, focusing on women discovering their sexuality and freedom with gentle yet ferocious monsters. Be seduced by a world of love, sex, and claws in this sex-positive gaming experience!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.6GHz or faster 64-bit CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 11 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 12 Monterey
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.6 GHz or faster Intel or Apple Silicon
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 LTS or SteamOS
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.6GHz or faster 64-bit CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia, AMD or Intel Graphics with support for Vulkan 1.2
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: © Time Galleon Studio 2023. All rights reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:

  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 1.6GHz or faster 64-bit CPU
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX® 11 compatible
  • Storage: 2 GB available space

  • Processor: Multi-core 1.6 GHz or faster Intel or Apple Silicon
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM

  • Processor: Multi-core 1.6GHz or faster 64-bit CPU
